name: 1.2 Patient Admission
cypher: MATCH (p:Patient {patientId: $patientId}) MATCH (hcu:HealthcareUnit {unitId: $unitId}) MATCH (diag:Diagnosis {code: $diagnosisCode}) CREATE (adm:Event:Admission {eventId: $admissionId, date: $admissionDate}) CREATE (p)-[:HAD_EVENT]->(adm) CREATE (adm)-[:PERFORMED_AT]->(hcu) CREATE (adm)-[:HAS_DIAGNOSIS {type: 'PRIMARY'}]->(diag)

name: 2.2 Hospital Admission Analysis
cypher: MATCH (adm:Admission)-[:PERFORMED_AT]->(hcu:HealthcareUnit) WHERE adm.date STARTS WITH $year RETURN hcu.unitId AS hospital, count(adm) AS numberOfAdmissions ORDER BY numberOfAdmissions DESC LIMIT 20

name: 2.3 Disease Analysis
cypher: MATCH (e:Event)-[r:HAS_DIAGNOSIS]->(d:Diagnosis) WHERE r.type = 'PRIMARY' RETURN d.code AS diagnosisCode, count(e) AS totalEvents ORDER BY totalEvents DESC LIMIT 25

name: 3.1 Readmission Analysis
cypher: MATCH (p:Patient {patientId: $patientId})-[:HAD_EVENT]->(e) WHERE e:Discharge OR e:Admission WITH p, collect(e) as events UNWIND events as discharge WITH p, events, discharge WHERE discharge:Discharge UNWIND events as admission WITH p, discharge, admission WHERE admission:Admission AND admission.date > discharge.date WITH p, discharge, admission, duration.between(date(discharge.date), date(admission.date)).days AS daysToReadmission WHERE daysToReadmission > 0 AND daysToReadmission <= 30 RETURN p.patientId AS patient, discharge.date AS dischargeDate, admission.date AS readmissionDate, daysToReadmission ORDER BY daysToReadmission

name: 3.2 Disease Co-occurrence
cypher: MATCH (d1:Diagnosis)<-[:HAS_DIAGNOSIS]-(e:Event)-[:HAS_DIAGNOSIS]->(d2:Diagnosis) WHERE id(d1) < id(d2) RETURN d1.code AS diagnosis1, d2.code AS diagnosis2, count(e) AS co_occurrences ORDER BY co_occurrences DESC LIMIT 50
